comment: Florida insurance-adequacy conditions: windstorm coverage and percentage-based hurricane deductibles; condo master-policy review.

rules.description: Florida property insurance: confirm windstorm/hurricane coverage with acceptable percentage deductible (2/3/5/10% of insured value) and flood-zone determination; condominiums additionally require master policy and HO-6 adequacy review
rules.citation: Fla. Stat. §627.701 (hurricane deductibles); GSE project/insurance standards

artifact_always.text_template: Evidence of windstorm/hurricane coverage with acceptable percentage deductible and current flood-zone determination{condo_suffix}.
